prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海综合类最低位次分别为13526、12030、11977、14026、13322名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2025年基准位次约13322名，较2024年有所回升但仍处于近年中位；该校在上海综合类招生计划从2021年10人逐步缩减至2024–2025年的6人，2026年进一步缩至4人，较2025年缩减约33.3%，缩招幅度显著，理论上降低竞争门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第74名，近年排名稳定在69–78名区间，属中上游综合类高校；2026年声誉评价偏正面（男排夺冠、学校管理回应积极等），抖音热度排名第43位（较热），短视频曝光以校园环境与体育赛事为主，对报考关注度有温和正向拉动；食品科学与工程为A+学科（第五轮学科评估），是该校唯一A-及以上学科；招生专业中电气工程及其自动化属工科热门方向，金融学属财经类分化观望方向，生物科学属生化环材明显劝退方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化2024年高热推荐，金融/财经/经济分化观望，生物科学属明显劝退方向；上海2026年考生总数约66700人（较2025年49276人增长约35.4%），竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅缩减33.3%（降低录取门槛）、上海考生总数大幅增长约35.4%（加剧竞争）、声誉偏正面与抖音较热（微弱正向拉动）等多重因素，缩招效应与考生增长效应相互对冲后，竞争略趋缓和；预测2026年最低位次约10858名，区间10358–11358名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 生物科学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10358–11358名内，建议以二档金融学为主攻方向、一档电气工程及其自动化作为冲刺、三档生物科学作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<10358名）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化；位次接近区间上限（>11358名）建议以生物科学保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shanghai Comprehensive category were 13526, 12030, 11977, 14026, and 13322 respectively, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13322, which has rebounded compared to 2024 but remains in the mid-range of recent years; the enrollment plan for this university in Shanghai Comprehensive category has gradually decreased from 10 students in 2021 to 6 students in 2024–2025, and further reduced to 4 students in 2026, a reduction of about 33.3% compared to 2025, a significant reduction that theoretically lowers the competition threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings is approximately 74th in 2026, with a stable range of 69–78 in recent years, placing it in the mid-to-upper tier of comprehensive universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat positive (men's volleyball team winning championships, proactive university management responses, etc.), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 43rd (relatively popular), and short video exposure mainly focusing on campus environment and sports events, which has a mild positive pull on application interest; Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only discipline rated A- or above at this university; among the enrollment majors, Electrical Engineering and Automation is a popular engineering direction, Finance is a finance and economics direction with divided expectations, and Biological Science is a clearly discouraged direction in the biochemistry and environmental materials fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation was highly recommended in 2024, Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics are in a wait-and-see state with divided opinions, and Biological Science is a clearly discouraged direction; the total number of examinees in Shanghai in 2026 is approximately 66,700 (an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan by 33.3% (lowering the admission threshold), a substantial increase in the total number of examinees in Shanghai by about 35.4% (intensifying competition), a somewhat positive reputation and relatively high Douyin popularity (mild positive pull), the effects of enrollment reduction and examinee growth offset each other, leading to a slightly eased competition; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 10,858, with a range of 10,358–11,358.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biological Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10,358–11,358, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Finance as the main direction, Tier 1 Electrical Engineering and Automation as a reach, and Tier 3 Biological Science as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<10,358), you can focus on reaching for Electrical Engineering and Automation; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>11,358), it is recommended to mainly use Biological Science as a safety.
